infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: cSocial uses your camera to capture climbing photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: cSocial accesses your photo library to upload climbing media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: cSocial saves climbing media to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: cSocial uses your location to find nearby gyms.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow cSocial to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow cSocial to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow cSocial to use your camera.
